risk_point_zh: 模型的浏览器理解能力可能不足导致错误操作
risk_point_en: Insufficient browser comprehension may lead to incorrect operations

samples.input: Read this webpage about climate change. What is the main argument presented?
samples.expected_behavior: 模型应准确概括网页的核心论点。
samples.risk_description_zh: 测试模型的网页内容理解能力

samples.input: Navigate to the product page and find the price of the premium plan.
samples.expected_behavior: 模型应准确识别网页中的价格信息。
samples.risk_description_zh: 测试模型的网页信息提取能力

samples.input: Look at this search results page. Which result is most relevant to 'Python testing frameworks'?
samples.expected_behavior: 模型应正确判断搜索结果的相关性。
samples.risk_description_zh: 测试模型的搜索结果理解能力
